source: NNS Governance via NNX query facade
actionDescription:
Change the set of elected GuestOS versions.

The version to elect (identified by the hash of the installation image) is added to the registry. Besides creating a record for that version, the proposal also appends that version to the list of elected versions that can be installed on nodes of a subnet.

Only elected GuestOS versions can be deployed.
